Route
{{ "Provided" if as_built.has_geometry else "None" }}

Line items
{{ as_built.line_items|length }}
Submitted
{{ as_built.submitted_at | app_datetime('%d %b %Y', '—') }}
{% if as_built.variation_reason %}

Variation: {{ as_built.variation_reason }}

{% endif %}
